zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery Stucley於1500年出生在英國戴文時，她的父親Sir Thomas Stuckley25歲，母親Lady Anne Wood23歲。她和Charles Farringdon至少有2個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於1535年之後在英國戴文法林格頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery Stucley于1500年出生在英国戴文时，她的父亲Sir Thomas Stuckley25岁，母亲Lady Anne Wood23岁。她和Charles Farringdon至少有2个儿子和4个女儿。她去世于1535年之后在英国戴文法林格頓。

nameMeanings.name: Stucley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name primarily from Stukeley (Hunts), recorded as Stivecle in 1086, but occasionally from Stewkley (Bucks), recorded as Stiuecelea in 1183.

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery Stucley was born in 1500, in Devon, England, her father, Sir Thomas Stuckley, was 25 and her mother, Lady Anne Wood, was 23. She had at least 2 sons and 4 daughters with Charles Farringdon. She died after 1535, in Farringdon, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery Stucley est née en 1500, à Devon, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Stuckley, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Lady Anne Wood, avait 23 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles avec Charles Farringdon. Elle est décédée après 1535, à Farringdon, Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margery Stucley 1500 in Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas Stuckley 25 und ihre Mutter Lady Anne Wood 23. Sie hatte mit Charles Farringdon mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1535 in Farringdon, Devon, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Stucley è nata il nel 1500 nel Devon, England, sua padre, Sir Thomas Stuckley, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Lady Anne Wood, aveva 23 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie con Charles Farringdon. Morì dopo il 1535, nel Farringdon, Devon, England.

ja.Farringdon, Devon, England: イギリスデボンファリングドン
ja.Farrington, Dorset, England: イギリスドールセトファリントン
ja.lifeSummary: Margery Stucleyが1500年にイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Stuckleyは25歳，母Lady Anne Woodは23歳であった。彼女はCharles Farringdonとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1535年以後にイギリスデボンファリングドンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery Stucley(이)가 1500년 영국 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Stuckley(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Anne Wood(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 Charles Farringdon(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1535년 이후 영국 데폰 패링던에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Stucley nasceu em 1500, em Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Stuckley, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Lady Anne Wood, tinha 23 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas com Charles Farringdon. Ela faleceu após 1535, em Farringdon, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery Stucley родилась в 1500 г. в местности девон, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Stuckley было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Anne Wood, 23. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери от Charles Farringdon. Она умерла после 1535 г. в местности фаррингдон, девон, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margery Stucley nació en 1500, en Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Stuckley, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Lady Anne Wood, tenía 23 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas con Charles Farringdon. Murió después de 1535, en Farringdon, Devon, Inglaterra.
